note_families.note: Note 1 — Summary of Significant Accounting Policies
key_facts: Lemon juice production facility: Valencia, California
DHG acquisition Oct 2024: $67.6M from STC Brands (related party), $1.4M goodwill, $31.3M intangibles
Franchise fee structure (Operators): base 12-15% of sales + additional 50% of net profit
Operator real estate leases: month-to-month (US), 5-year (Canada/Puerto Rico)
Revolving Facility: $800M max, matures Sep 2026, SOFR + 0.875-1.125%, $0 drawn in 2023/2024
Related Party Note: $750M face, 4.75% fixed, 25-year term maturing Nov 2043; treasury shares pledged as collateral
2024 Senior Notes: $750M (Series H $500M at 4.97% 3-yr, Series I $250M at 5.11% 5-yr)
All covenants in compliance as of Dec 31, 2024
Defined benefit pension plan — frozen to new participants
EDC (nonqualified deferred compensation) plan — supplemental benefit for select employees
EDC defined contribution benefit — 5-15% salary with dollar-for-dollar match up to 5%
Rabbi Trust assets: $446.2M (2024), $398.9M (2023) — mostly equity mutual funds
SERP: supplemental executive retirement plan, closed to new entrants, vest at 55/20yrs service
Postretirement health care plan — eligible at 55 with 20 years or Director+ with 10 years
Operating leases weighted avg: 3.43% discount, 18.5 yr remaining
Finance leases weighted avg: 4.52% discount, 18.2 yr remaining
Total future operating lease payments: $3.70B, PV $2.71B
Total future finance lease payments: $2.69B, PV $1.80B
Westside Future Fund (WFF): 16.67% interest, social impact real estate in Atlanta, ~$12.2M carrying value
Engage Venture Fund II/III: Delaware limited partnerships
Outstanding unpaid capital subscriptions: $7M (as of Dec 31, 2024)
